description: Returns the list of supported GDAL raster drivers.
Reads a raster file and returns a table with the raster data.
Transforms the BLOB data of the data band columns into an array of a numeric data type.
example: SELECT RT_Cube2ArrayInt32(databand_1, true) AS r FROM RT_Read('path/to/raster/file.tif');

description: Transforms an array of numeric values into a databand column (BLOB).
example: SELECT RT_Array2Cube(r.values, 'RAW', r.bands, r.cols, r.rows, r.no_data) FROM ...;

description: Negate the values in the datacube element-wise.
Takes the absolute value of the values in the datacube element-wise.
Takes the square root of the values in the datacube element-wise.
Takes the logarithm of the values in the datacube element-wise.
Takes the exponential of the values in the datacube element-wise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are equal to datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are not equal to datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are greater than datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are greater than or equal to datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are less than datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Return 1 where values in datacube_a are less than or equal to datacube_b or a scalar value, 0 otherwise.
Add the values in datacube_a to datacube_b or a scalar value element-wise.
Subtract datacube_b or a scalar value from the values in datacube_a element-wise.
Multiply the values in datacube_a by datacube_b or a scalar value element-wise.
Divide the values in datacube_a by datacube_b or a scalar value element-wise.
Take the power of the values in datacube_a to datacube_b or a scalar value element-wise.
Exports the data table to a new raster file.
example: COPY ( SELECT geometry, databand_1 FROM RT_Read('path/to/raster/file.tif') ) TO 'path/to/raster/newfile.tif' WITH (FORMAT RASTER, DRIVER 'COG'...);
